              MODIFIED 3 source files + 1 NEW:
              - deploy/compose/dev/docker-compose.pdf-renderer.yml — replaced `wget` healthcheck (binary not in node:22-slim) with `node -e` HTTP probe. Container reaches (healthy) state 30s after recreate.
              - packages/storage/src/index.ts — added `APP_ENV_TO_BUCKET_ENV: Record<string,string>` mapping {development→dev, staging→staging, production→prod}. `getExportsBucketName` now translates APP_ENV → bucket env segment at the storage boundary; throws on unknown APP_ENV (silent fallthrough to "dev" would risk prod data in dev bucket). Module JSDoc preamble updated with the mapping table. Matches DECISIONS_LOG §142.
              - packages/storage/src/__tests__/storage.test.ts — beforeEach APP_ENV switched from misleading "test" to realistic "development". +3 new tests on getExportsBucketName: maps development → dev-exports, maps production → prod-exports, throws on unknown APP_ENV value. Storage test count 12 → 15.
              - scripts/rotate-demo-site-admin-password.sh NEW — reusable credential rotation script. Per Scenario 34: openssl-generates a 22-char password, updates .env.{env} via sed, updates CREDENTIALS.md row via structural awk slicing (NEVER cats the file or echoes the value), applies bcrypt hash via `pnpm db:seed` (dev) or emits SQL UPDATE statement to /tmp/rotate-sql-{env}.sql (staging/prod). Dev mode executed in this session; staging/prod modes await user execution + server-side SQL apply.
